title: Sensex Today | Stock Market Live: Sensex slips 220 pts, Nifty nears 24,000; South Korea's Kospi triggers circuit breaker
description: Sensex Today | Stock Market Live: Sensex and Nifty traded in a narrow range on Tuesday morning as gains in pharma, banking and realty stocks were offset by weakness in IT and metal shares.Midcaps and smallcaps were mixed, while India VIX declined nearly 3 percent.
